title: Portuguese Flaky Pastry Tarts
description: Delicious pastries filled with a sweet marshmallow surprise. Inspired by traditional Portuguese cuisine.
instructions: Roll out the flaky pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a marshmallow in the center of each dough circle.
Sprinkle a pinch of sugar over the marshmallow.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a triangle or a square.
Press the edges together to seal the pastry.
Brush the tops with a little water and sprinkle with sugar.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Optional: Drizzle with a little vanilla extract for added flavor.
